title: Brand Associate
description: EY is a leading professional services firm with 312K employees serving clients across audit, tax, consulting, and advisory. You'll work with top-tier clients on strategic brand initiatives.
responsibilities: Develop and implement brand strategy initiatives
Create brand guidelines and marketing standards
Analyze brand perception and market positioning

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or Business Administration
requirements.experience_years: 1-3 years of brand management, marketing, or communications experience

benefits: Paid vacation, holidays, and personal days
